moves.name: Bowser Bomb
moves.notes: data assumes down b lands on same height platform it started

moves.name: Fire Breath
moves.notes: frames listed are the minimum amount of frames move will be active (if you quickly tab b)

moves.name: Koopa Klaw
moves.notes: scratch can do 12, 10, or 8% damage. when grabbed, "bite" does 4%, forward throw does 13%, and back throw does 9%

moves.name: Koopa Klaw (Air)
moves.notes: scratch can do 12, 10, or 8% damage. when grabbed, bite does 4%, forward throw does 13%, and back throw does 9%

moves.name: Bowser Bomb (Air)
moves.notes: active until landing, then 60 frames of endlag

moves.name: Whirling Fortress (Air)
moves.notes: can also do 3% damage. all hitboxes connecting will result in 29% damage. able to grab edge 13 frames before freefall if started in the air

moves.name: Fire Breath (Air)
moves.notes: frames listed are the minimum anmount of frames move will be active (if you quickly tab b)
